treatment_information.specific_treatment: Coronary artery bypass grafts x1 (LIMA-LAD) and AVR tissue (19mm Trifecta)
treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient appears to be in sinus rhythm post-surgery with no TEE related complications.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented with fatigue and was encouraged to have a stress echo.
Stress echo demonstrated severe aortic stenosis.
Patient was found to have 3 vessel coronary artery disease and referred for AVR/CABG evaluation.
Surgery performed: Coronary artery bypass grafts and aortic valve replacement.
Post-operative assessment showed patient in sinus rhythm and stable condition.

patient_outcome.final_status: Alert and oriented, ambulating with walker, incisional pain managed.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow-up appointment with surgeon to discuss driving and further recovery.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Incisions healing well, no erythema or drainage.
